positive: A maximalist, repeating geometric pattern composition featuring stylized cosmic flora and constellations. The primary elements should be glowing, bioluminescent vines, crescent moon phases, and stylized nebula clusters integrated into interlocking hexagonal forms. Use a limited, vibrant color palette of deep indigo, electric teal, ethereal gold, and cosmic magenta. The style should evoke Art Nouveau meets vaporwave psychedelia, rendered with sharp, high-contrast clean linework and solid color fills suitable for screen printing. The composition must be perfectly balanced and tileable, creating a mesmerizing, seamless surface design with strong central focus and visible negative space.
negative: low detail, noise, blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, messy, realistic photo, photorealism
